displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising #1
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1 is the first issue in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Freedon Nadd Uprising series of comics. It was published on August 2, 1994 by Dark Horse Comics.
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising #1
